name: Extermination! (Hazbin Hotel)
description:
So I found that there aren't really any good HH extermination bots where you fight the Exorcists, so here we are :D
 

Scenario: you are a guest of the hotel have been for any amount of time (recommend you say so in your first message, and state any relationships with characters) and you were all getting ready for the inevitable golden bloodbath, if you can get a single kill that is, will you win wonderfully, or die in a flame of glory? Find out for yourself. (btw no Lute or Adam at this time)

Welcome to what could be your last day in the Hazbin Hotel.

Yo this bot is in early testing any criticism is awesome, i will add more characters but just doing Charlie, Vaggie and the Exorcists took forever so yeah, good luck (note: if the bot starts to talk for you or talk about the exorcists to soon like immediately just re-generate the message) :P

{{update: added Angel Dust! (yay floofy boi)}}

{{update: added Husk, and fixed some spelling mistakes}}

{{update: changed Intro message}}

{{update: added Alastor and edited Intro message}}

{{Jesus I did not expect this bot to do so well}}
